AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Build with Nano Banana Pro, our Gemini 3 Pro Image model
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: Google announces the availability of Nano Banana Pro, the Gemini 3 Pro Image model, for developers to integrate into their applications. This release allows building with advanced image generation capabilities for text-accurate and studio-grade visuals.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Introducing Nano Banana Pro
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: Google introduces Nano Banana Pro, a new Gemini 3 Pro Image model designed to generate text-accurate and studio-grade visuals. This release provides enhanced capabilities for AI-powered image creation.

AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: NVIDIA AI announces Nemotron-Elastic-12B, a versatile AI model offering 6B, 9B, and 12B variants from a single training, eliminating extra training costs. This provides developers with flexible model options for various AI applications.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Moonshot AI Researchers Introduce Seer: An Online Context Learning System for Fast Synchronous Reinforcement Learning RL Rollouts
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: Moonshot AI researchers have introduced Seer, an online context learning system designed to facilitate fast synchronous reinforcement learning (RL) rollouts. This system aims to improve efficiency and performance in RL applications.

This model aims to advance the capabilities of AI-driven image generation for various creative applications.

AI Agents & Frameworks.title: Windows 11 adds AI agent that runs in background with access to personal folders
AI Agents & Frameworks.summary: Windows 11 is reportedly integrating a new background AI agent with access to personal user data, raising potential security and privacy concerns. This feature signifies a deeper integration of AI agents into operating systems.
